post.title: Digital Taxidermy Spool Tower
post.heading: 3D Printing stuff to re-use empty plastic Filament Spools
post.description: Using Digital Taxidermy's Spool Tower creations to re-use empty Filament Spools.
post.content:
# Table of contents

# Intro

# Spool-Ganizer
